title: Avenastrum insubricum
intro:
I couldn't find any information on Avenastrum insubricum. However, I can provide information on Avenastrum insubricum is not a commonly recognized plant, however a similar plant is Avena insularis.

If you are referring to Avena insularis, here is the information:

Avena insularis, also known as Avenastrum insubricum, is a type of grass in the Poaceae family, but more commonly known as Avena, which is a genus of grasses commonly referred to as oats.

The health benefits of Avena insularis (Avena) include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.

The bioactive constituents of Avena insularis (Avena) include avenanthramides, avenadin, and avenacosides, which are known for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Avena insularis (Avena) include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used as a natural remedy for promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality.
